aim.desc_short: Sacrifice movement for +1 die on a ranged attack.
aim.desc_long: Once Per Activation. This unit may sacrifice movement to gain +1 die on its next ranged attack. Declare before rolling.

ambush.desc_short: Deploy hidden; gain first strike when revealed.
ambush.desc_long: Deployment. May deploy hidden. Reveal at any time to gain first strike in melee.

anchor.desc_short: Cannot be moved by enemy effects.
anchor.desc_long: Passive. This unit cannot be moved by enemy abilities or effects. Ignores knockback and displacement.

assistant.desc_long: Passive. May assist an adjacent Mystic or Scientist with special activations or effects, as defined on the unit card.

audio_suppression.desc_long: Passive. This unit is immune to sound-based abilities, fear effects, and sonic attacks unless explicitly stated otherwise.

iron_shoes.desc_short: Move up to 2" after a melee kill.
iron_shoes.desc_long: Passive. When this unit destroys an enemy model in melee, it may immediately move up to 2".

armored.desc_short: Ignore the first point of damage from attacks.
armored.desc_long: Passive. The first point of damage this unit would take from an attack is ignored. Does not apply to automatic damage unless stated.
